description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, release-docker, and test-build. In the build stage add a bins job that runs on the golang:1.8-alpine image, executes the exact commands: `apk add --no-cache build-base git bash`, `echo "http://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/edge/main" >> /etc/apk/repositories`, `echo "http://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/edge/community" >> /etc/apk/repositories`, `echo "http://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/edge/testing" >> /etc/apk/repositories`, `apk add --no-cache upx`, `mkdir -p /go/src/gitlab.com/ulm0/graphql-docker-api/`, `cp -r ./ /go/src/gitlab.com/ulm0/graphql-docker-api/`, `cd /go/src/gitlab.com/ulm0/graphql-docker-api/cmd/gdapi`, `go get -d ./`, `CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -a -ldflags="-s -w" -installsuffix cgo -o /builds/ulm0/graphql-docker-api/gdapi-amd64 main.go`, `CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARM=5 GOARCH=arm go build -a -ldflags="-s -w" -installsuffix cgo -o /builds/ulm0/graphql-docker-api/gdapi-armv5 main.go`, `CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARM=7 GOARCH=arm go build -a -ldflags="-s -w" -installsuffix cgo -o /builds/ulm0/graphql-docker-api/gdapi-armv7 main.go`, `CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -a -ldflags="-s -w" -installsuffix cgo -o /builds/ulm0/graphql-docker-api/gdapi-arm64 main.go`, `cd /builds/ulm0/graphql-docker-api/`, `upx --ultra-brute -qq gdapi-*`. The job keeps the built binaries as artifacts (expire in 1 week, name $CI_JOB_NAME, paths to all four binaries) and runs only on tag pipelines. In the release-docker stage add a docker-gql job that uses the docker:17.06 image with a docker:17.06-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, and runs: `docker build --build-arg BUILD_DATE=`date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"` --build-arg VCS_REF=$CI_COMMIT_SHA --build-arg VERSION=$(echo $CI_COMMIT_TAG | sed 's|v||') -t ulm0/$CI_JOB_NAME:$(echo $CI_COMMIT_TAG | sed 's|v||') .`, `docker tag ulm0/$CI_JOB_NAME:$(echo $CI_COMMIT_TAG | sed 's|v||') ulm0/$CI_JOB_NAME:latest`, `docker tag ulm0/$CI_JOB_NAME:$(echo $CI_COMMIT_TAG | sed 's|v||') $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$(echo $CI_COMMIT_TAG | sed 's|v||')`, `docker tag ulm0/$CI_JOB_NAME:$(echo $CI_COMMIT_TAG | sed 's|v||') $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest`, `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`, `docker login -u $DOCKER_HUB_USER -p $DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD`, `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE`, `docker push ulm0/$CI_JOB_NAME`, `docker logout $CI_REGISTRY`, `docker logout`. It pushes the image to both the GitLab Container Registry and Docker Hub and runs only on tag pipelines. In the test-build stage add a test-bin job (also on golang:1.8-alpine) that repeats the same setup steps but builds only the amd64 binary, compresses it with upx, and stores it as an artifact (expire in 1 week, name $CI_JOB_NAME, path to gdapi-amd64); this job runs on all branches except tags.
